overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through grassy hills and pine forests. The character encounters a cow and later a horse rider while traversing the open wilderness under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside nature trail with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through tall grass and rolling hills

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the grassy terrain
tall pine trees lining the left side of the trail
tall pine trees lining the right side of the trail
rolling hills covered in tall green and gold grass
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through an open grassy landscape. Tall pine trees frame the path on both sides while rolling hills stretch into the distance under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with cow encounter

events.description: a white cow appears standing on the right side of the trail ahead
character breaks into a run to pass the cow on the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching a cow blocking the trail and running past it to continue forward

notable_agents.action: white cow standing on the trail edge then moving away as the character approaches and runs past

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, a white cow appears standing on the right side of the path. The character breaks into a run to pass the animal and continues down the winding trail through the grassy hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail descending into valley

events.description: a wooden utility pole appears on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sloping trail away from the cow encounter

entered.detail: single wooden post standing beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the trail which descends gradually into a valley. A wooden utility pole appears on the right side of the path as the trail winds through denser pine forest sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with horse rider encounter

events.description: a horse rider appears on the trail ahead moving toward the character
the horse rider passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a mounted rider approaches from ahead and passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from down the trail, then passing by on the right

segments.scene_description: A horse rider appears in the distance approaching along the same trail. The character continues walking as the rider draws closer and passes by on the right side, continuing up the trail in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley trail with distant views

agents.ego_description: walking down the trail into the open valley after the horse rider has passed

segments.scene_description: After the horse rider passes, the character continues walking down the trail into a more open valley area. The path stretches ahead through grassy terrain with scattered pine trees and distant mountains visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a winding dirt trail that transitions from open grassy hills into a forested valley. It begins with the character walking through a bright landscape of rolling hills and framing pine trees under a scattered cloud sky. As the path curves, the character breaks into a run to pass a white cow standing by the roadside before the trail descends gradually into a denser pine forest marked by a wooden utility pole. The scene then shifts as a horse rider appears in the distance, approaching and passing the character on the right before continuing in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera follows the character as the forest opens back up into a wide valley with scattered trees and distant mountains visible on the horizon.
